down_idle.action: standing idle, facing the viewer (front view); subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

down_right_idle.action: standing idle, facing the down_right direction; subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

right_idle.action: standing idle, pure side profile view facing camera-right; subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

up_right_idle.action: standing idle, facing the up_right direction; subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

up_idle.action: standing idle, facing away from the viewer (back view, no visible face); subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

up_left_idle.action: standing idle, facing the up_left direction; subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

left_idle.action: standing idle, pure side profile view facing camera-left; subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

down_left_idle.action: standing idle, facing the down_left direction; subtle breathing; canonical direction anchor derived from the base

down_walk.action: four-phase walk: left leg forward, passing, right leg forward, passing; keep the cat's identity and tail silhouette locked

down_right_walk.action: four-phase diagonal walk toward camera-right and slightly toward the viewer

up_right_walk.action: four-phase diagonal walk away from the viewer toward camera-right

up_walk.action: four-phase back-view walk away from the viewer; backpack and tail remain readable

up_left_walk.action: four-phase diagonal walk away from the viewer toward camera-left

down_left_walk.action: four-phase diagonal walk toward camera-left and slightly toward the viewer

style: match the supplied base character exactly: preserve its proportions, face, clothing, accessories, palette, outline weight, and rendering style; do not redesign it
